holdings.infoBox: RSPH is an equity ETF with a total of 62 individual holdings. The top holdings are Humana stock at 3.56%, Centene at 2.84%, UnitedHealth Group at 2.36%, DaVita at 2.29%, and West Pharmaceutical Services at 2.29%.

overview.description: The Invesco S&P 500 Equal Weight Health Care ETF (RSPH) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in health care equity. The fund tracks an equal-weighted index of US health care companies taken from the S&P 500 Index. RSPH was launched on Nov 1, 2006 and is issued by Invesco.

data.title: Final Trades: Apple, Palo Alto Networks, Western Union and the RSPH
data.text: The Investment Committee give you thieir top stocks to watch for the second half.
